name: Avalon Acquisition Inc. Class A Common Stock
summary: Avalon Acquisition Inc. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. These companies are generally formed by investors or sponsors with expertise in a particular industry or sector, with the intention of using the funds raised in the IPO to acquire a private company in that industry or sector. Avalon Acquisition Inc. has not yet specified a target industry.
